decisions.D1: Full chain verification runs on ALL records; output filters applied after
decisions.D2: compliant_export true only when integrity_failures=[], posture_mismatches=[], total_scanned>0
decisions.D3: Reader role is phase1_audit_reader; all mutating/authorizing ops return audit.reader.unauthorized
decisions.D4: Posture-mismatch records excluded from verified_records and reported in posture_mismatches

remaining_blockers.B-C: Appender / reader role boundary proof (surface 7 of S3-R30-C1-A)
remaining_blockers.B-D: Post-implementation full regression matrix; must include P-43 confirmation
remaining_blockers.P-43: Production store append must gate on clean rebuild status (before deployment authorization)
